title: SCALE_NODES cap at 500 may hide scaling issues in CI
description: min(SCALE_NODES, 500) is ok for demo but test should have a separate full_scale test or use env without hard cap if >500 supported by sim. Also missing try/finally for cleanup. P2 readability. Codereview pass #3.
close_reason: Fixed SCALE_NODES handling, added full_scale test, try/finally cleanup, independent oracle for scaling behavior; verified with cargo test+clippy
